_pAll.desc: Padding on all sides of contents. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.

_pTop.desc: Padding on top of contents. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.

_pLeft.desc: Padding on left of contents. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.

_pRight.desc: Padding on right of contents. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.

_pBottom.desc: Padding on bottom of contents. Can be integer, percent, auto or initial.
